title: Custom eggless cakes for Schofields and Marsden Park families
summary:
The North West is growing fast. The custom cake options haven't kept up.

Num Nums Bakery is at Riverstone Shopping Centre — 10 minutes from Schofields, Marsden Park, and Box Hill. Every cake is 100% eggless. Not some cakes. Every single one.

Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Photo references welcome — we recreate designs in-house.

48 hours minimum notice. That's what fresh baking actually takes. Pickup from Riverstone Shopping Centre, free parking on-site.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
